basics.summary: I'm currently studying for a B.S. in Computer Science at the University of Hawaii at Manoa. I expect to graduate in Fall 2027.

work.company: International Structural Engineering and Construction (ISEC) Society
work.summary: Full-stack developer on the ISEC IT team.
highlights: Maintain, update, and oversee the ISEC website
Create new and improve existing systems for conference participants
Provide technical and customer support for conference participants

volunteer.summary: Participated in various community service projects for non-profit beneficiaries.

Contributed to multiple service initiatives and non-profits.

awards.summary: Hawai’i residents with a high school cumulative GPA of 3.6 or higher will be considered for a $4,000 scholarship per year. Total $16,000 over 4 years.
